sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n95781" key="spartopw/lhs" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σπαρτο-πώλης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n95781.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">dealer in ropes</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">mats of</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">σπάρτος</foreign>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:7:181" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.181</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
